array.string:
LOCK_FILE="${HOME}/OneDrive/Artha/.artha-decrypted" VAULT="${HOME}/OneDrive/Artha/scripts/vault.sh" WATCHDOG_LOG="/tmp/artha-watchdog.log" TIMESTAMP=$(date -Iseconds)
# Only act if lock file exists (session was started) if [[ -f "${LOCK_FILE}" ]]; then # Check if any claude process is running if ! pgrep -x "claude" > /dev/null 2>&1 && \ ! pgrep -f "claude-code" > /dev/null 2>&1; then # No active Claude session — encrypt stale plaintext echo "[${TIMESTAMP}] WATCHDOG: Lock file found, no claude process. Auto-encrypting." >> "${WATCHDOG_LOG}" if [[ -x "${VAULT}" ]]; then "${VAULT}" encrypt >> "${WATCHDOG_LOG}" 2>&1 echo "[${TIMESTAMP}] WATCHDOG: Auto-encrypt complete." >> "${WATCHDOG_LOG}" else echo "[${TIMESTAMP}] WATCHDOG: ERROR — vault.sh not executable at ${VAULT}" >> "${WATCHDOG_LOG}" fi else echo "[${TIMESTAMP}] WATCHDOG: Lock file present + claude process active. No action." >> "${WATCHDOG_LOG}" fi fi
